characters.appearance: A man in his late 30s or early 40s with a fair complexion, lean to medium build, and prominent facial features. He has dark eyes and short, dark hair, though his hairstyle changes between scenes (from a buzz cut to a slightly longer style).
characters.wardrobe: In the 'before' state, he wears a simple, loose-fitting white tunic. In the 'after' state, he wears a pale yellow t-shirt with a faint graphic print on the chest.
characters.demeanor: His demeanor shifts dramatically from extreme distress, frustration, and confusion to calm, serious, and confident.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A (Voiceover) says: 12 years of school and expensive coaching, but when it's time to speak English in an interview...
Character A says: [Screaming and crying in frustration]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks viewer with relatable frustration of freezing during an interview (Payload beat d & e)
- Names English immediately in the first 5 seconds
- Sets up the dramatic contrast between old failed methods and the new solution
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
My English after spending thousands on coaching classes

My English after practicing 15 minutes a day on the Supernova app

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Now, I speak flawlessly. How? I stopped reading and started speaking on Supernova.
Character A says: My AI teacher, Miss Nova, practices real job interviews with me.
Character A says: I make a hundred mistakes, and she corrects me live without any judgment.
Character A says: She even explains the logic in my mother tongue. 
Character A says: Just 15 minutes a day. That's how I learned, and you can too.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the core retention engine: privacy/no-judgment (beat b) and personalization (beat a)
- Highlights the 'speak, don't read' differentiator (beat c) and mother-tongue logic (beat g)
- Closes with positive time anchor (15 mins) and universality claim
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
My English after spending thousands on coaching classes

My English after practicing 15 minutes a day on the Supernova app

Install Supernova, start speaking today

payload_audit.beats_covered: a (corrects live), b (without judgment), c (started speaking), d (expensive coaching), e (job interviews), g (mother tongue)
payload_audit.kept_from_seed: Preserved the split-screen '3 Idiots' meme format of frustrated vs flawless speaker
payload_audit.price_check: No hard rupee figure used; removed the competitor's '3 rupee' claim
